description: You are the administrator for the Urban Electronics store. Several configuration issues have been reported that need immediate fixing via the Drupal Commerce admin interface. Publish the 'Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra' product to make it available in the catalog. Correct the 'Urban Electronics' store contact email to 'store@urbanelectronics.com'. Update the 'Electronics 15% Off' promotion end date to December 31, 2025. Unblock the account for customer 'mikewilson' (email: mike.wilson@example.com).
